name: Breezy HR ATS API
what_it_does: Small-to-mid market applicant tracking system with REST API for managing job postings, candidates, applications, and pipeline stages — with automated candidate messaging, questionnaires, and team collaboration for growing teams.
use_cases: Creating and managing job postings programmatically via API
Syncing candidate applications from career site with internal HRIS via webhook
Querying candidate pipeline data for recruiting analytics
Automating candidate status updates and communications via API triggers
Integrating Breezy with HRIS on candidate hired events via webhook
not_for: Enterprise recruiting at thousands of hires/year (use Greenhouse or Workday Recruiting)
Advanced analytics and reporting without BI tool integration
Complex structured interview workflows with scorecards and calibration sessions
best_when: A growing SMB or startup needs an affordable, easy-to-use ATS with API access for basic HRIS integration and career site customization.
avoid_when: You need enterprise analytics, complex structured interviewing, or recruiter productivity features beyond basic pipeline management.

auth.notes: OAuth2 Authorization Code for integrations. Company ID and access token required. No fine-grained OAuth2 scopes — full account access. Access token expiry with refresh token. Company subdomain in API URLs.

pricing.paid_tiers: Startup from $157/month; Growth from $273/month; Business custom
pricing.notes: Free tier limited to 1 position. Paid plans for unlimited positions. US-based. Simple pricing for SMBs. API access on paid plans. Smaller developer ecosystem than Greenhouse or Lever. Good for early-stage companies.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; not publicly documented in detail

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covering companies, positions, candidates, and pipeline stages. OAuth2 for integration access. Webhook support for candidate events. Moderate documentation quality. Company ID required in URL paths. Smaller API surface than Greenhouse.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Candidate creation may create duplicates — check by email first. Position management idempotent. Stage transitions create new events. Application reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Company subdomain required in all API URLs — different from typical API patterns
OAuth2 access token expiry requires refresh implementation
API documentation less comprehensive than Greenhouse or Lever
No candidate deduplication by default — may create duplicate profiles

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 for integrations. Candidate PII handled according to GDPR. No formal certifications beyond GDPR compliance. Standard ATS security practices.
